description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a white perimeter fence and lush landscaping, including several palm trees and broad-leafed trees. The structure features a flat roof, large glass windows, and a combination of brick and white exterior walls. The front yard includes a paved driveway leading to a carport, while the backyard boasts a swimming pool, patio area, and additional green space. The layout is open, with multiple entry points and a visible central courtyard. The property is designed for suburban or urban residential living, offering both privacy and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, single-story brick and white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, driveway, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and landscaped front yard with trees and a white fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the car parked in the driveway, dense tree coverage, and the side of the house with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and large glass windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the expanse of the backyard, additional trees, and the side elevation of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
